input.background: Four percent of the children in a large school population have asthma.
input.question: The number of asthmatics in a simple random sample of n = 20 from this population is a binomial random variable with n = 20 and p = 0.04.

output.answer: The number of asthmatics in a simple random sample of n = 20 from this population is a binomial random variable with n = 20 and p = 0.04.

n.description: The sample size, representing the number of trials in the binomial distribution.

p.description: The probability of success (having asthma) in each trial.

X.description: The number of asthmatics in the sample, a binomial random variable.
